scripts.cf:build: npm run prebuild:local && npm run cf:build:raw
scripts.cf:preview: npm run cf:build && wrangler dev --config wrangler.toml
scripts.cf:deploy:dry-run: npm run prebuild:remote && npm run cf:build:raw && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml --dry-run
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run prebuild:remote && npm run cf:build:raw && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
scripts.ci:deploy:dry-run: npm run prebuild:remote && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml --dry-run
scripts.ci:deploy: npm run prebuild:remote && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
scripts.d1:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply insightflare --config wrangler.toml --local
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply insightflare --config wrangler.toml --remote
scripts.d1:migration:create: wrangler d1 migrations create insightflare --config wrangler.toml
